Authors: T Yokota, Y Yu, K Araseki, T Arai
Title: Bis (imidazolidine)-Derived NCN Nickel-Pincer-Catalyzed Asymmetric Reactions
Abstract: A bis(imidazolidine)-derived NCN nickel-pincer complex (tBu-PhBidine-Ni-OTf: NCN-Ni-OTf) was synthesized by the oxidative addition of imidazolidine-containing aryl triflate to Ni(cod) …
